blended.narrative: Powderhorn is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 5,513 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 6" over the past week. Current depth: 24".
